summary: Frontend testing complete for /blog/appliance-lifespan page. All 20 test features from the Precision Craft design system passed. Page correctly implements hero with breadcrumb (Home → Blog → Expert Advice), Expert Advice pill, date/time, H1 title, Lifespan Visual Overview (5 progress bars), TOC with 8 anchor links, 5 appliance sections with lifespan badges and FactorList and TipBox, Mid-article CTA after Dryers, Quick Reference Table with 6 rows, When to Start Planning (2x2 grid of 4 cards), FAQ accordion (5 items), Bottom CTA, Author box, 3 sidebar widgets, Related Services (3 cards), footer, floating button, and mobile sticky bar.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /blog/appliance-lifespan page is fully functional with all Precision Craft design elements. This is a static React component with no backend API calls. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas for SEO (NOT react-helmet-async). TipBox uses dot bullets (not numbered steps). SectionH2 uses lifespan badge format (10-13 YRS) instead of numbered circles.

tests_passed: Hero renders with breadcrumb (Home → Blog → Expert Advice)

6 min read shown

Minimal footer with logo, phone (760) 543-5733, copyright 2026
Floating BOOK REPAIR button appears after 300px scroll on desktop (class hidden md:flex)
Mobile sticky bar with CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons (class flex md:hidden)
Responsive: 2-column (748px/352px gap 40px) on desktop, 1-column on mobile
